zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard de Sotheworth Lord Samlesbury於1410年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾薩苗萊斯波利時，他的父親Sir Thomas Southworth17歲，母親Joan Booth24歲。他於1443年與Elizabeth Molyneux結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他去世於1472年12月21日在英國藍卡爾沃爾頓勒-達爾聖 萊昂納達斯 邱奇享年62歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭藍卡爾薩苗萊斯波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Richard de Sotheworth Lord Samlesbury于1410年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾薩苗萊斯波利时，他的父亲Sir Thomas Southworth17岁，母亲Joan Booth24岁。他于1443年与Elizabeth Molyneux结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他去世于1472年12月21日在英国藍卡爾沃爾頓勒-達爾聖 萊昂納達斯 邱奇享年62岁，埋葬在英国英格兰藍卡爾薩苗萊斯波利。

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard de Sotheworth Lord Samlesbury was born in 1410, in Samlesbury, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Thomas Southworth, was 17 and his mother, Joan Booth, was 24. He married Elizabeth Molyneux in 1443. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 8 daughters. He died on 21 December 1472, in St Leonard's Church, Walton-le-Dale, Lancashire, England, at the age of 62, and was buried in Samlesbury, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Richard de Sotheworth Lord Samlesbury est né en 1410, à Samlesbury, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Thomas Southworth, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Joan Booth, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Molyneux en 1443. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 8 filles. Il est décédé le 21 décembre 1472, à St Leonard's Church, Walton-le-Dale, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Samlesbury, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.St Leonards, Lancashire, England: St Leonard's Church, Walton-le-Dale, Lancashire, England
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Richard de Sotheworth Lord Samlesbury 1410 in Samlesbury, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas Southworth 17 und seine Mutter Joan Booth 24. Er hat 1443 Elizabeth Molyneux geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 8 Töchter. Er starb am 21. Dezember 1472 im Alter von 62 Jahren in St Leonard's Church, Walton-le-Dale, Lancashire, England und wurde in Samlesbury, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Morì il 21 dicembre 1472, nel St Leonard's Church, Walton-le-Dale, Lancashire, England, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Samlesbury, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ko.St Leonards, Lancashire, England: 영국 랭카실르 월토-레-데일 스트 리나르드'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard de Sotheworth Lord Samlesbury(이)가 1410년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 샘레스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Southworth(은)는 17세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Booth(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1443년 Elizabeth Molyneux(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1472년 12월 21일 영국 랭카실르 월토-레-데일 스트 리나르드'스 c후르치에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 샘레스버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard de Sotheworth Lord Samlesbury nasceu em 1410, em Samlesbury, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Thomas Southworth, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Joan Booth, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Molyneux em 1443. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 8 filhas. Ele faleceu em 21 de dezembro de 1472, em St Leonard's Church, Walton-le-Dale, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Samlesbury, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.St Leonards, Lancashire, England: ст леонард'с чурч, валтон-ле-деил, ланкашир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard de Sotheworth Lord Samlesbury родился в 1410 г. в местности сэмлесбури, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Southworth было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Booth, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Molyneux в 1443 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 8 дочерей. Он умер 21 декабря 1472 г. в местности ст леонард'с чурч, валтон-ле-деил, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности сэмлесбури, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Elizabeth Molyneux en 1443. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 8 hijas. Murió el 21 de diciembre de 1472, en St Leonard's Church, Walton-le-Dale, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en Samlesbury, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
